name: P-6 prompt-promote --dry-run reports the planned promotion without mutating the registry per §2.14
command:
mkdir -p prompts/eval-history/test-agent && printf '%s' '{"eval_pass_rate":0.95}' > prompts/eval-history/test-agent/2.0.0.json && printf -- '- id: test-agent
  versions:
    - version: 1.0.0, eval_pass_rate: 0.9, status: active
    - version: 2.0.0, eval_pass_rate: 0.95, status: candidate
' > prompts/registry.yaml && cp prompts/registry.yaml r.bak && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/prompt-promote.sh" test-agent 2.0.0 --dry-run 2>err.txt && diff prompts/registry.yaml r.bak && grep -qE 'would promote|dry-run' err.txt && echo skipped 1>&2
